note: GeneralAdapter1 — the adapter Bundler3 multicall(Call[]) legs target on Ethereum mainnet. EVERY external-mutating selector triaged (I1). cover = 20 legs: 10 user position legs (erc4626Deposit/Mint/Withdraw/Redeem → metamorpho; morphoSupply/SupplyCollateral/Borrow/Repay/Withdraw/WithdrawCollateral → morpho_blue) + 6 funding/plumbing legs (erc20Transfer/erc20TransferFrom/permit2TransferFrom/nativeTransfer → token/erc20_transfer; wrapNative/unwrapNative → net WETH/native credit) + 3 Lido staking legs (stakeEth → liquid_staking/stake; wrapStEth/unwrapStEth → wrap/unwrap) + morphoFlashLoan (reenter_only — no body, callback recurses), reached per-leg-to from a Bundler3 bundle. morphoSupply/Repay/SupplyCollateral + morphoFlashLoan declare emit.reenter_callback_arg=data so the reenter(Call[]) callback is decoded generically (no engine selector list). exclude = onMorpho* callbacks (reenterHash-guarded; their payload IS the decoded reenter callback), MORPHO governance wrapper.

0x6ef5eeae.name: erc4626Deposit(address,uint256,uint256,address)
0x6ef5eeae.reason: user ERC-4626 erc4626Deposit into a MetaMorpho vault VIA Bundler3/GeneralAdapter1 → LendingAction (vault=$args.vault, asset=injected underlying). Decoded as a per-leg-to multicall child.

0x2075be03.name: onMorphoSupply(uint256,bytes)
0x2075be03.reason: Morpho callback (called BY Morpho mid-bundle under the reenterHash guard) — not a user pre-sign entrypoint.

0xb1022fdf.name: onMorphoSupplyCollateral(uint256,bytes)
0xb1022fdf.reason: Morpho callback (called BY Morpho mid-bundle under the reenterHash guard) — not a user pre-sign entrypoint.

0x05b4591c.name: onMorphoRepay(uint256,bytes)
0x05b4591c.reason: Morpho callback (called BY Morpho mid-bundle under the reenterHash guard) — not a user pre-sign entrypoint.

0x31f57072.name: onMorphoFlashLoan(uint256,bytes)
0x31f57072.reason: Morpho callback (called BY Morpho mid-bundle under the reenterHash guard) — not a user pre-sign entrypoint.

0xe2975912.name: morphoFlashLoan(address,uint256,bytes)
0xe2975912.reason: GA1 morphoFlashLoan: borrows assets via a Morpho Blue flash loan; the borrowed funds are used+repaid in the reenter(Call[]) callback carried in `data` (the leverage intent). Net-neutral, so strategy=reenter_only (NO own body) — only the callback legs recurse via emit.reenter_callback_arg. Per-leg-to multicall child.

0x54f09129.name: stakeEth(uint256,uint256,address,address)
0x54f09129.reason: GA1 stakeEth: stake `amount` native ETH into Lido (→stETH) for receiver → liquid_staking/stake (venue=lido). Per-leg-to multicall child (Lido-collateral leverage zap).

0x5a18a7d0.name: wrapStEth(uint256,address)
0x5a18a7d0.reason: GA1 wrapStEth: wrap `amount` stETH → wstETH → liquid_staking/wrap (venue=lido). Per-leg-to multicall child.

0xe17aeb46.name: unwrapStEth(uint256,address)
0xe17aeb46.reason: GA1 unwrapStEth: unwrap `amount` wstETH → stETH → liquid_staking/unwrap (venue=lido). Per-leg-to multicall child.

0xbff63170.name: morphoWrapperDepositFor(address,uint256)
0xbff63170.reason: DEFERRED: legacy MORPHO token wrapper (governance-token migration) — token-level, low value.

0xa387bd8e.name: morphoWrapperWithdrawTo(address,uint256)
0xa387bd8e.reason: DEFERRED: legacy MORPHO token wrapper (governance-token migration) — token-level, low value.

0x3790767d.name: erc20Transfer(address,address,uint256)
0x3790767d.reason: GA1 sends `amount` of `token` to `receiver` from its own balance (bundle funding / leftover sweep) → token/erc20_transfer (token+amount+recipient legible). Per-leg-to multicall child.

0xd96ca0b9.name: erc20TransferFrom(address,address,uint256)
0xd96ca0b9.reason: GA1 pulls `amount` of `token` from the bundle initiator (user ERC20 approval) to `receiver` → token/erc20_transfer. Bundle token-IN (over-pull bound by the approval).

0x827fcfcc.name: permit2TransferFrom(address,address,uint256)
0x827fcfcc.reason: GA1 pulls `amount` of `token` from the user via Permit2 ALLOWANCE to `receiver` → token/erc20_transfer. Bundle token-IN (over-pull bound by the Permit2 allowance); owner/nonce/deadline not in this calldata.

0xf2522bcd.name: nativeTransfer(address,uint256)
0xf2522bcd.reason: GA1 sends `amount` native ETH to `receiver` from its own balance → token/erc20_transfer (native token key). Per-leg-to multicall child.

0x3244c12c.name: wrapNative(uint256,address)
0x3244c12c.reason: GA1 wraps `amount` native ETH into WETH, credits `receiver` → token/erc20_transfer of the net WETH credit ($resolved.weth). Per-leg-to multicall child.

0xb172af6d.name: unwrapNative(uint256,address)
0xb172af6d.reason: GA1 unwraps `amount` WETH into native ETH, credits `receiver` → token/erc20_transfer of the net native credit. Per-leg-to multicall child.
